name: ozge-site
description: Personal full-stack website for Özge Büyüktorun — React + Express + Prisma monorepo.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @ozge/api && npm run build -w @ozge/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @ozge/api && npm run lint -w @ozge/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @ozge/api && npm run typecheck -w @ozge/web
